details.message: reports/board/ directory did not exist at scan time. Created by this governance run as remediation.
Deprecated directory moltbot/ exists at repo root with active Python modules: __init__.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, agents/.

scripts/run_molt_workflow.py (line 16) imports from moltbot module: 'from moltbot import (run_learning_orchestrator, run_engineering_sentinel, ...)'. This is active code referencing a deprecated module.

scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references 'Clawdbot integration was removed' in docstrings/strings. Located in scripts/ (not docs/reports exclusion zone). Content documents removal rather than active usage.
